assertions.title: Article grid loads with server-side data

steps.expected: Grid renders with columns (Title, Categories, Date Added, Date Edited, Display) and row checkboxes
steps.observed: Grid loaded with all expected columns, select-all checkbox, and 10 data rows on page 1
Empty-state rendered: 'No articles match your search.'

evidence.network: Browser fetches: GET /api/admin/articles?page=1&limit=10&sort=date&order=desc and GET /api/admin/articles?page=1&limit=10&sort=date&order=desc&search=g6grid_no_match_zzz; supplemental curl: 200 (total=12,count=10) and 200 (total=0,count=0)

steps.expected: Rows filter to matching article(s) and count updates
steps.observed: Grid filtered to a single matching row: g6grid_20260319112217_search_target

evidence.network: Browser fetch: GET /api/admin/articles?...&search=g6grid_20260319112217_search_target; supplemental curl: 200 with total=1,count=1

steps.observed: Ascending order shown; top rows begin with article_00, article_01, article_02
Descending order shown; top rows begin with search_target, article_11, article_10

evidence.network: Browser fetches: GET /api/admin/articles?page=1&limit=10&sort=title&order=asc and ...order=desc; supplemental curl confirms both 200 with reordered titles

steps.expected: Pagination controls appear for multiple pages
Second page shows remaining slice of records
steps.observed: Page 2 displayed different rows (article_01, article_00), count=2

evidence.network: Browser fetch: GET /api/admin/articles?page=2&limit=10&sort=title&order=desc; supplemental curl: 200 with total=12,page=2,count=2

steps.expected: Assigned categories shown by name; no-category rows show empty state
steps.observed: Category names rendered (e.g., g6grid_..._cat_alpha/cat_beta) and uncategorized rows show em-dash

evidence.network: Supplemental curl /api/admin/articles?page=1&limit=10&sort=title&order=desc -> 200; payload includes categories arrays with catName values and empty arrays for uncategorized rows

steps.expected: Both active and inactive states are visually indicated according to article display setting
steps.observed: Both 'Active' and 'Inactive' badges are visible across seeded rows

evidence.network: Supplemental curl /api/admin/articles?page=1&limit=10&sort=title&order=desc -> 200; payload contains mix of articleDisplay='y' and 'n' matching visible badges

frictions.description: Pagination number controls did not resolve via role-link query in agent-browser; controls are rendered as clickable elements without href.
frictions.resolution: Used DOM click by aria-label (Page 2/Page 1) via agent-browser eval for deterministic navigation.

summary: Tested 6 assertions for admin article grid: 6 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
